## 📝 Description

A clear and concise description of what this PR changes and why.

**What problem does this solve?**
- Fixes issue #[issue number]
- Implements feature requested in #[issue number]
- Addresses bug where [description]

## 🎯 Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 📖 Documentation update
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] ✓ Test addition/improvement

## 🧪 Testing

Describe what testing you've done:

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Tested on Windows
- [ ] Tested on macOS
- [ ] Tested on Linux
- [ ] All tests pass locally: `pytest tests/ -v`
- [ ] Build succeeds locally: `python build_local.py`

**Manual Testing Steps:**
1. Load PDF: [describe what PDF you used]
2. Perform action: [describe what you tested]
3. Verify: [describe expected result]

## 📋 Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style (type hints, docstrings)
- [ ] I have self-reviewed my code
- [ ] I have commented complex logic
- [ ] I have updated documentation (README, guides, etc.)
- [ ] I have updated CHANGELOG.md
- [ ] No new dependencies added (or discussed in issue first)
- [ ] No breaking changes (or documented in CHANGELOG.md)
- [ ] No new warnings or errors in logs
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and follow convention

## 🔗 Related Issues

Closes #[issue number]  
Related to #[issue number]

## 📸 Screenshots (if applicable)

For UI changes, include before/after screenshots:

```
[Paste screenshot or description]
```

## 📝 Additional Notes

Any additional context that reviewers should know?

---

## ✅ Ready for Review?

Before marking as ready, please ensure:

- [ ] Tests pass: `pytest tests/ -v`
- [ ] Build passes: `python build_local.py`
- [ ] Code is clean and follows style guide
- [ ] All checkboxes above are complete
- [ ] You've tested your changes locally

---

**Thank you for contributing to NullifyPDF!** 🚀
